speaker: speaker1
text: Hi , Helen ! how is it going ?

speaker: speaker2
text: I'm very busy these days . It seems I can never finish my work .

speaker: speaker1
text: Well , take it easy ! Don't let it get on top of you .

speaker: speaker2
text: I'll try . I'm under a lot of pressure right now .

speaker: speaker1
text: Why don't you take a few days off ?

speaker: speaker2
text: I can't . I am really behind of my work .
